message:
test: add comprehensive TUI dashboard test coverage

Add 40+ unit tests covering edge cases for:
- Pressure gauge rendering (zero, full, NaN, infinity, narrow width)
- Normalized pressure clamping and NaN handling
- IO pressure calculation at zero, cap, and overflow
- Cache hit ratio with all-hits, all-misses, and large values
- Degradation level labels for all 5 variants
- Degradation event formatting with and without reason text
- Dashboard state management (sequential updates, default equivalence)
- Input handling (quit on Q, ignore arrows/tab/enter)
- Layout rendering at various terminal sizes (80x24, 200x60, 20x10, 200x3)
- System health text with no events and event truncation
- Scrub panel clean/no-data/corrupt/io-error states

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
